heading: Selected
Publications
data.focus: My work investigates how environmental stressors reshape neural pathways, integrating behavioral data with clinical practice to uncover patterns for mental resilience.

featured.alt: fMRI brain scan with neural activity mapping
featured.title: Neural Synchronization in High-Output Academic Environments
featured.description: This study examines collective neuro-signatures of research teams under pressure, revealing how synchronized cortical patterns correlate with breakthrough discoveries in high-stakes academic settings.

items.title: The Plasticity of Resilience: Behavioral Interventions
items.summary: Mapping the recovery of cognitive load-bearing capacity post-trauma through targeted behavioral interventions, with a 12-month longitudinal follow-up.

items.title: Predictive Modeling of Stress Cycles
items.authors: Chen, X., Ginsburg, B., & Varma, R. (2019)
items.summary: Utilizing biometric feedback from wearable devices to anticipate anxiety episodes, achieving 87% predictive accuracy in controlled clinical trials.

items.title: Cognitive Load and Decision Fatigue in Clinical Settings
items.summary: A field study measuring the impact of sequential patient consultations on diagnostic accuracy, with recommendations for scheduling protocols.

items.title: Neuroplasticity Markers in Remote Work Populations
items.summary: Pioneering research on cortical thickness changes in professionals transitioning to remote work, foreshadowing the modern distributed workforce.
